title: Datapack UIs
description: Allows you to create data-driven Guis with datapacks
body:
# Datapack UIs
This mod utilizes [SGui](https://github.com/Patbox/sgui) to allow the creation of various
guis through data packs. Also supports (and includes) the [PlaceholderAPI](https://github.com/Patbox/TextPlaceholderAPI) and adds some extra placeholders. For info on how to use this mod check out the [wiki](https://github.com/Yorick-06/DatapackUIs/wiki).

Since this mod uses [Simple Resources](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-resources) the addons
for different file types ([Toml Resources](https://modrinth.com/mod/toml-resources) and [YAML Resources](https://modrinth.com/mod/yaml-resources)) will work with this mod.
